name: sap-table-field-remediator
description: Scan custom ECC ABAP for data access on tables/fields that change in an S/4HANA brownfield conversion, classify each finding by remediation complexity (T1/T2/T3), route it with a deterministic safety guard, and emit remediation-report.json. Ships a page-cited Simplification-List knowledge base over MCP for fix derivation.

author.name: TUM x Deloitte - AI Coding Skill 3
